driver_subject: drm: Convert open-coded yes/no strings to yesno()
stage1_reason: Driver changes from using ternary operator for yes/no strings to using str_yes_no() helper from linux/string_helpers.h, which is a kernel API change.
stage2_reason: Driver commit b8c75bd9746e explicitly converts open-coded yes/no strings to use str_yes_no() helper, which was introduced/consolidated in kernel commit ea4692c75e1c 'lib/string_helpers: Consolidate string helpers implementation' - this is a direct API adoption.
